'''Voxx''' was a fighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Rebel was stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. Voxx was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and was honored at a funeral service along with fellow pilots [[Blue Eight (Defiance)|Blue Eight]], [[Smithy]], [[Roanda]] and [[Waudok]].

==Appearances==
